message:
refactor(storage): consolidate ~40 read-path queries through spawn_blocking_storage helper

Introduces spawn_blocking_storage_with_join_error(), a parameterized
companion to the existing spawn_blocking_storage() helper, that accepts
a custom join-error prefix string. The original spawn_blocking_storage()
now delegates to the new method with the default "Task join error" prefix.

This enables ~40 read-only StorageHandle query methods — which previously
each had their own raw tokio::task::spawn_blocking(...).await.map_err(...)
boilerplate — to be expressed as a single
Self::spawn_blocking_storage[_with_join_error](...).await call.

The migration covers every read-path method in StorageHandle:
  query_usage_metrics, aggregate_daily_metrics, aggregate_by_agent,
  count_segments_before, count_events_before, count_events_by_tier,
  count_audit_actions_before, count_usage_metrics_before,
  count_notification_history_before, query_notification_history,
  get_notification, get_latest_checkpoint_hash, get_agent_session,
  get_active_sessions, get_sessions_for_pane, search_fts_with_snippets,
  store_segment_embedding, get_unembedded_segment_ids, get_segment_embedding,
  embedding_stats, search_semantic, search_hybrid, get_unhandled_events,
  get_events, get_timeline, query_unhandled_event_counts,
  get_last_activity_by_pane, get_audit_actions, query_audit_actions_stream,
  query_action_history, count_active_approvals, lookup_approval_token,
  get_max_seq, get_panes, get_pane, get_segments, scan_segments,
  get_latest_secret_scan_report, get_workflow, get_step_logs,
  get_latest_step_log, get_action_plan, get_prepared_plan,
  find_incomplete_workflows, get_accounts_by_service, get_account,
  get_active_reservation, list_active_reservations, export_segments,
  export_gaps, get_gaps, get_retention_cleanup_count,
  get_segment_time_range, export_workflows, export_sessions,
  export_reservations.

Net effect: -61 lines of duplicated error-mapping boilerplate removed.
Each method's error prefix is preserved exactly (methods that previously
used "Spawn blocking failed" keep that prefix via the _with_join_error
variant; methods that used "Task join error" use the default helper).
No behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
